query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A solitary broad-canopied tree stands on a gently rolling grassy hill, flanked by two smaller shrubs, in a fog-covered landscape. The sun appears as a bright, diffused orb in the hazy sky. Thick mist obscures the horizon and background details, softening the silhouettes of the vegetation against the sky, while the foreground terrain slopes downward into shadow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A muted, faded landscape rendered in desaturated sepia-grey tones with oppressively low contrast. A solitary tree stands on a grassy hill enveloped by heavy fog that obscures detail and flattens depth, while the sun appears as a diffuse, pale orb in the haze. The scene conveys atmospheric distress through its suffocating, melancholic mood and weak tonal separation between the dark foreground and the luminous sky.
